owner_directive: IMPERIUM is MetaOS/focusing layer, not AGI and not random prompt pile.
core_claims: Every internal IMPERIUM function must have an owning organ.
External LLM/tools/services are outside core and must route via organs or adapters.
Task flow must pass through organ core to learn, gate, record, and focus execution force.
Business target is stable, evidence-backed, wow-effect digital outputs/services.
operational_outcomes: higher evidence quality and anti-fake-green discipline
clear ownership and reduced function drift
stronger task routing and stage explainability
